name: wolfgang-rush
description: Wolfgang Rush — open-source Claude Code plugin family for Indian-court litigation drafting. 14 court-specific drafting plugins (Supreme Court, all High Courts, District Courts, MACT, Family, Consumer, Banking, IP, Tax, Labour, Property, Contracts, Company tribunals, Rent Control). Each plugin ships a 6-agent drafting pipeline (Reader → Format → Drafter → Verifier → Refiner → Overseer) with court-config-aware skeletons.

plugins.name: supreme-court-drafting
plugins.description: Drafts pleadings before the Supreme Court of India — SLPs, Writs under Article 32, Curative & Review petitions, Transfer petitions.

plugins.name: indian-hc-drafting
plugins.description: Bench-config-aware drafting plugin for any High Court of India — Writs under Article 226, PILs, Letters Patent Appeals, Criminal & Civil revisions.

plugins.name: district-court-drafting
plugins.description: Civil-side drafting plugin for District Courts across India — suits under CPC, applications, written statements, execution proceedings.

plugins.name: indian-family-drafting
plugins.description: Drafts pleadings before Indian Family Courts — divorce, maintenance, custody, guardianship, restitution of conjugal rights.

plugins.name: indian-consumer-drafting
plugins.description: Consumer-protection & medical-negligence drafting plugin for District / State / National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commissions under CPA 2019.

plugins.name: indian-mact-drafting
plugins.description: Motor Accident Claims Tribunal drafting plugin — compensation petitions under Section 166 MV Act, no-fault claims, insurance disputes.

plugins.name: indian-banking-drafting
plugins.description: Banking & financial-litigation drafting plugin — DRT applications, SARFAESI proceedings, NI Act §138, IBC §7/§95, DRAT appeals.

plugins.name: indian-labour-drafting
plugins.description: Labour, industrial-disputes & employment-rights drafting plugin — ID Act references, gratuity, ESI/PF, sexual-harassment complaints.

plugins.name: indian-ip-drafting
plugins.description: Intellectual-property litigation drafting — trademark infringement, copyright suits, patent revocations, passing-off actions.

plugins.name: indian-tax-drafting
plugins.description: Direct-tax appellate litigation drafting — ITAT appeals, CIT(A) appeals, writ petitions on tax matters, refund claims.

plugins.name: indian-property-drafting
plugins.description: Property, conveyancing, estate & inter-vivos transfer instruments — sale deeds, gift deeds, partition suits, specific performance.

plugins.name: indian-contracts-drafting
plugins.description: Contracts, personal-estate documents & contractual-litigation drafting — breach of contract, arbitration §8/§11/§34, recovery suits.

plugins.name: indian-company-drafting
plugins.description: Company-law tribunal litigation drafting — NCLT petitions under Companies Act 2013 (oppression & mismanagement, schemes of arrangement, reduction of capital, revival, investigation, class action) AND NCLAT appellate drafting (Companies Act §421 appeals and IBC §61 appeals from NCLT orders).

plugins.name: indian-rent-control-drafting
plugins.description: Rent-control / landlord-tenant litigation drafting across all major State Rent Control regimes — eviction (non-payment / bona-fide need / nuisance / sub-letting) under Maharashtra Rent Control Act 1999, Delhi Rent Control Act 1958, Tamil Nadu 2017 Act, Karnataka Rent Act 2001, West Bengal Premises Tenancy Act 1997, UP Urban Buildings Act 1972, Gujarat Rent Control Act, AP/Telangana Buildings Act 1960 · standard-rent / fair-rent fixation · rent-deposit · Section 106 TPA termination notice · landlord recovery suit · tenant written statement · revision/appeal · Model Tenancy Act 2021 framework.
